creator: pgiffuni@fps.biblos.unal.edu.co
text:
I have here a keymap for the Latin American Keyboards. Please include it
in the base distribution. I don't have ISO tables, but I have tested it 
on local keyboards.

Fix:

How-To-Repeat: I'm sending the diff file with respect to spanish.iso.kbd . 
You may notice columns 6 & 7 are the same as 2 & 3. An X session switches form rows 
2 & 3 to 6 & 7 (I don't know why).
